Tip Calculator

Calculate the tip amount and split the bill between multiple people.

FAQ

How much should I tip?

In the US, 15-20% is standard for restaurants. 15% for adequate service, 18% for good, 20%+ for excellent.

Is tip calculated before or after tax?

Traditionally, tips are calculated on the pre-tax amount, though many people tip on the total bill.
